notableEvents.label: Victor Mesa Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Victor Mesa Jr. grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Taylor Walls out at 2nd. Victor Mesa Jr. out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
